topic.en: AI data centers and power regulation

title.zh: 美国Ratepayer Protection Pledge扩展到数据中心开发商和公用事业，AI算力开始被要求“自己付电网账单”
title.en: The expanded Ratepayer Protection Pledge makes AI compute pay for its own grid burden

summary.zh: 美国白宫更新的Ratepayer Protection Pledge页面显示，已有200多个组织加入，覆盖约80%的美国居民和企业供电，并把州长、云厂商、公用事业和数据中心开发商都纳入同一承诺框架。承诺核心是：数据中心需要的新发电、电力输送升级、专用费率和社区韧性投入，应由需求方承担，而不是转嫁给普通用户。行业含义是，AI基础设施审批正在从“能不能拿到电”升级为“谁为新增容量、备用电源、并网和地方影响负责”。未来项目融资、选址和电力采购会更像基础设施特许经营，监管机构会要求可审计的成本分摊，而不是只看算力投资规模。
summary.en: The White House's updated Ratepayer Protection Pledge page says more than 200 organisations have joined, covering roughly 80% of U.S. power delivered to homes and businesses and bringing governors, hyperscalers, utilities, and data-center developers into one commitment framework. The central commitment is that new generation, delivery upgrades, dedicated rate structures, and community-resilience contributions required by data centers should be paid for by the demand creators, not ordinary ratepayers. The industry signal is that AI infrastructure permitting is moving from 'can the project secure power?' to 'who is accountable for new capacity, backup generation, interconnection, and local impacts?' Future financing, siting, and power procurement will look more like infrastructure concessions, with regulators asking for auditable cost allocation rather than accepting headline compute investment.

watch.zh: 关注州监管机构是否把自愿承诺写入具体费率、并网协议和开发许可；没有强制条款，承诺仍可能停留在政治风险管理。
watch.en: Watch whether state regulators turn the voluntary pledge into rate orders, interconnection agreements, and development approvals; without enforceable terms, it remains partly political risk management.

liveUpdates.reference: White House Ratepayer Protection Pledge page and public reporting on the July 2026 expansion

referenceLinks.label: AP: Trump expands pledge on AI data-center utility bills

title.zh: NIST把AI数据中心安全放到架构、供应链、OT和设施施工同一张桌面上
title.en: NIST puts AI data-center security across architecture, supply chain, OT, and facility delivery

summary.zh: NIST在2026年7月22日至23日举行“Securing AI Data Center”线上研讨会，并在7月23日更新页面，议题覆盖AI数据中心架构、硬件软件、数据存储、访问控制、供应链、Operational Technology、设施施工、供电、可持续性、物理安全和人员安全。这个范围说明，AI数据中心正在从普通商业机房变成国家级关键基础设施：模型安全不只由算法团队负责，也取决于电气系统、冷却系统、施工质量、供应链可追溯性和物理访问控制。对行业而言，下一阶段的数据中心竞争会同时考验网络安全、工程交付和运营合规能力，单纯追求更高机柜功率密度已不够。
summary.en: NIST held its 'Securing AI Data Center' virtual workshop on 22-23 July 2026 and updated the event page on 23 July. The agenda spans AI data-center architecture, hardware and software, data storage, access control, supply chain, operational technology, facility construction, power, sustainability, physical security, and personnel security. That scope shows AI data centers moving from ordinary commercial facilities toward critical national infrastructure: model security is not only an algorithm-team problem, but also depends on electrical systems, cooling systems, construction quality, supply-chain traceability, and physical access control. For the industry, the next phase of data-center competition will test cybersecurity, engineering delivery, and operating compliance together; higher rack power density alone is no longer enough.

watch.zh: 关注NIST后续是否发布可执行的安全控制、测试方法或标准路线图，尤其是OT、供电和物理安全如何进入数据中心验收。
watch.en: Watch whether NIST follows with actionable controls, test methods, or standards roadmaps, especially for OT, power, and physical security acceptance.

liveUpdates.reference: NIST workshop on AI data-center security, architecture and emerging standards, July 2026

referenceLinks.label: NIST: Securing AI Data Center workshop

title.zh: FDA选择TEMPO首个数字健康设备试点，慢病管理AI进入“真实世界数据换取监管弹性”的阶段
title.en: FDA's first TEMPO participant moves digital health AI into a real-world-data-for-regulatory-flexibility phase

summary.zh: FDA在2026年7月22日宣布TEMPO数字健康设备试点的首个参与者为Dexcom Glucose Health Program，适用场景为早期心肾代谢和心肾代谢慢病管理，意图通过数字健康指标、实时数据和AI洞察支持患者和护理团队决策。FDA同时说明，试点设备有效性尚未被FDA评价，参与企业需要收集、监测和报告真实世界数据。行业含义是，数字健康不再只靠软件发布速度竞争，而是进入“覆盖支付模型、真实世界证据、安全监测和监管边界”的组合赛道。对医疗AI公司来说，能否把数据闭环写成合规流程，将决定产品能否从健康管理工具走向临床和医保场景。
summary.en: On 22 July 2026, the FDA announced Dexcom Glucose Health Program as the first participant in the TEMPO digital health devices pilot, covering early cardio-kidney-metabolic and cardio-kidney-metabolic chronic disease use cases, with digital health metrics, real-time data, and AI insights intended to support patients and care teams. FDA also states that the effectiveness of devices in the pilot has not yet been evaluated by the agency, and participating manufacturers must collect, monitor, and report real-world data. The industry implication is that digital health is no longer competing only on software release speed; it is entering a combined lane of coverage models, real-world evidence, safety monitoring, and regulatory boundaries. For medical AI companies, the ability to turn data loops into compliant processes will determine whether products can move from wellness tools into clinical and reimbursement settings.

watch.zh: 关注真实世界数据指标、患者安全事件、医保支付效果和FDA后续参与者名单；这些会决定TEMPO是监管沙盒还是可复制审批路径。
watch.en: Watch real-world-data metrics, patient safety events, reimbursement outcomes, and later FDA participant selections; these will show whether TEMPO is a sandbox or a repeatable pathway.

liveUpdates.reference: FDA TEMPO digital health devices pilot update, July 2026

referenceLinks.label: FDA: First participant selected for TEMPO pilot

title.zh: 气候韧性正在从单个构件加固转向交通、水、电和城市系统之间的服务连续性设计
title.en: Climate resilience is moving from isolated asset hardening to service-continuity design across transport, water, power, and urban systems

evidence.zh: 资料类型：UNECE 2026年6月交通基础设施适应报告和ASCE 2026年系统韧性报道；内容：交通网络将面对洪水、高温、海平面、冰雪和永久冻土变化等更强风险，社区需要用系统方法识别道路、桥梁、水务和电力网络之间的相互依赖。
evidence.en: Evidence: UNECE's June 2026 transport-infrastructure adaptation release and ASCE's 2026 coverage of system-of-systems resilience; transport networks face stronger flood, heat, sea-level, snow, ice, and permafrost risks, while communities need system methods to identify dependencies among roads, bridges, water, and power networks.

summary.zh: 传统工程韧性常被理解为把单个资产做得更结实，例如提高桥梁通航水位、加大排水能力或增强边坡防护。近期资料提醒，基础设施真正失效时往往不是单一构件问题，而是服务链断裂：道路被淹导致维修队伍无法到达泵站，供电中断导致交通控制失效，极端高温同时影响轨道、路面、医院和通信设施。因此，结构和土木工程师需要把设计问题从“单体安全系数是否足够”扩展到“系统在扰动后能否维持关键服务”。这会改变项目前期工作：风险地图、冗余路线、跨部门数据、恢复时间目标和全寿命成本将更早进入方案比选。边界是，系统韧性不能替代构件验算；它要求构件设计、运营计划和应急恢复共同被审查。
summary.en: Traditional engineering resilience is often treated as making individual assets stronger, such as raising bridge clearances, increasing drainage capacity, or improving slope protection. Recent sources underline that infrastructure failure is often not a single-member problem but a service-chain failure: flooded roads prevent crews from reaching pump stations, power loss disables traffic control, and extreme heat can affect rail, pavement, hospitals, and communications at the same time. Civil and structural engineers therefore need to expand the design question from 'is the asset factor of safety adequate?' to 'can the system maintain critical service after disruption?' This changes early project work: risk maps, redundant routes, cross-agency data, recovery-time objectives, and life-cycle cost enter option selection earlier. The boundary is that system resilience does not replace member checks; it requires asset design, operating plans, and recovery strategy to be reviewed together.

caveat.zh: 韧性指标必须和具体服务目标绑定，例如通行能力、供水恢复时间或电力备用水平；抽象评分本身不能证明项目更安全。
caveat.en: Resilience metrics must be tied to service targets such as traffic capacity, water restoration time, or backup power level; an abstract score alone does not prove a safer project.

insights.reference: UNECE and ASCE sources on transport and system-of-systems resilience, 2026

referenceLinks.label: ASCE: System-of-systems method for resilient infrastructure

area.zh: 工程计算模型质量控制
area.en: Quality control for engineering calculation models

title.zh: 软件计算模型的核心风险不是是否“高级”，而是输入、假设、版本和独立校核是否可追溯
title.en: The key risk in software-based calculation models is not sophistication, but traceable inputs, assumptions, versions, and independent checking

evidence.zh: 资料类型：IStructE在2026年7月发布的计算模型指南说明；内容：新指南为软件计算模型的开发、使用和验证提供质量保证和质量控制框架。
evidence.en: Evidence: IStructE's July 2026 calculation-model guidance note; it describes a quality-assurance and quality-control framework for developing, using, and verifying software-based calculation models.

summary.zh: 结构工程已经离不开有限元、参数化脚本、电子表格和专业设计软件，但模型越复杂，错误越可能藏在默认设置、单位、边界条件、荷载组合映射、网格收敛或版本变化里。新指南的行业信号是，未来工程师的价值不会只体现在会操作软件，而是能把计算模型变成可审查的工程证据：为什么选这个模型层级，哪些输入来自图纸或规范，哪些假设需要设计负责人批准，哪些结果需要手算量级复核，哪些版本变更会影响既有结论。AI辅助建模会放大这个要求，因为自动生成的模型更需要可追溯输入和独立验证。边界在于，质量控制不是把所有模型都做得更重，而是按风险等级匹配验证深度。
summary.en: Structural engineering now depends on finite-element models, parametric scripts, spreadsheets, and specialist design software, but the more complex the model, the more likely mistakes hide in defaults, units, boundary conditions, load-combination mapping, mesh convergence, or version changes. The industry signal from the new guidance is that future engineering value will not only be software operation, but turning calculation models into reviewable engineering evidence: why this model level was chosen, which inputs came from drawings or codes, which assumptions need design-lead approval, which results need hand-check magnitude verification, and which version changes affect previous conclusions. AI-assisted modelling will intensify this requirement because automatically generated models need traceable inputs and independent verification even more. The boundary is that QA does not mean making every model heavier; it means matching verification depth to risk.

caveat.zh: 低风险草算和关键安全验算不应采用同一套验证强度；模型控制应按后果、复杂度和可逆性分级。
caveat.en: A low-risk scoping calculation and a critical safety check should not use the same verification intensity; model control should be graded by consequence, complexity, and reversibility.

insights.reference: IStructE guidance on calculation models for engineering calculations, July 2026

area.zh: 岩土设计交付与规范化

title.zh: 岩土工程交付正在更强调“报告、规格和设计参数”的闭环，而不是只给一个承载力数字
title.en: Geotechnical delivery is putting more weight on the report-specification-parameter loop, not just a bearing value

evidence.zh: 资料类型：Caltrans Geotechnical Manual公开页面；内容：该手册记录岩土调查、设计和报告的标准做法，并列出2026年更新或实施的报告、挡土、地震、土钉、地基、下穿结构、土工合成加筋路堤和规格说明相关模块。
evidence.en: Evidence: Caltrans' public Geotechnical Manual page; it documents standards of practice for geotechnical investigations, design, and reporting, with multiple 2026 implementation or update dates for reporting, earth-retaining, seismic, soil-nail, foundation, below-grade, geosynthetic embankment, and specification-note modules.

summary.zh: 岩土风险常被压缩成一个看似简单的数值，例如允许承载力、桩端阻力或主动土压力系数。但真实项目的风险来自链条：现场调查是否覆盖关键地层，试验参数是否与设计模型一致，地下水和腐蚀条件是否进入耐久性判断，施工方法是否改变土体状态，规格说明是否把设计假设转化为可执行验收要求。Caltrans持续更新模块化手册说明，大型基础设施业主正在把岩土交付从“提交报告”推向“报告、设计参数、图纸、规格和施工反馈”闭环。对工程师的趋势要求是，岩土建议需要可追溯、可更新、可被施工团队执行，而不是只在设计阶段给出一个保守数字。边界是，标准化不能替代项目特定判断，尤其在软土、液化、滑坡和临时开挖条件下。
summary.en: Geotechnical risk is often compressed into a simple-looking number, such as allowable bearing pressure, pile toe resistance, or an active earth pressure coefficient. In real projects, risk sits in the chain: whether investigation covers critical strata, whether test parameters match the design model, whether groundwater and corrosion conditions enter durability decisions, whether construction methods change soil state, and whether specifications turn design assumptions into enforceable acceptance requirements. Caltrans' continuing modular manual updates show major infrastructure owners pushing geotechnical delivery from 'submit a report' toward a closed loop among reports, design parameters, drawings, specifications, and construction feedback. The trend requirement for engineers is that geotechnical recommendations must be traceable, updateable, and executable by construction teams, not just conservative numbers at design stage. The boundary is that standardisation cannot replace project-specific judgement, especially in soft soils, liquefaction, landslide, and temporary excavation conditions.

caveat.zh: 岩土参数具有场地依赖性；手册和模板能提高一致性，但不能消除补充勘察、现场观察和施工阶段再判断的需要。
caveat.en: Geotechnical parameters are site-dependent; manuals and templates improve consistency but do not remove the need for supplemental investigation, field observation, and construction-stage re-judgement.

insights.reference: Caltrans Geotechnical Manual public module list and 2026 implementation updates

title.zh: 耐火极限不是温度标签：为什么结构防火设计要同时看火灾场景、升温、承载力和疏散目标？
title.en: Fire resistance is not a temperature label: why structural fire design must link fire scenario, heating, capacity, and evacuation objectives

text.zh: 结构防火设计常被误解为给梁、柱、楼板贴上一个“1小时”或“2小时”耐火标签。真实问题更复杂：火灾首先是一个随时间变化的热作用，构件温度由火灾曲线、通风、可燃物、保护层、截面形状和热惯性共同决定；结构安全则取决于高温下材料强度和刚度退化、约束热膨胀产生的附加内力、整体体系能否在局部构件受热后重新分配作用，以及人员疏散和消防介入的时间目标。中国、澳洲、欧洲和美国体系表达不同。中国工程实践通常把建筑防火规范的耐火等级、构件耐火极限和专项结构防火标准结合使用；澳洲体系通过NCC的性能要求、Deemed-to-Satisfy路径和工程化Performance Solution组织防火设计；Eurocode体系把火灾作用、构件温度和高温材料折减写成结构火灾设计链条；美国体系常在建筑规范、ASTM E119/UL试验评级和性能化消防工程之间组织要求。跨体系复核时，关键不是把“120 min”直接等同为同一安全水平，而是确认设计火灾、荷载水平、构件边界、保护系统、失效准则和疏散目标是否一致。若这些假设没有对齐，同样的耐火时间可能对应完全不同的热输入和结构可靠度。
text.en: Structural fire design is often misunderstood as assigning a one-hour or two-hour fire-resistance label to beams, columns, or slabs. The real problem is more complex: fire is a time-dependent thermal action, and member temperature depends on the fire curve, ventilation, fuel load, protection, section shape, and thermal inertia. Structural safety then depends on strength and stiffness degradation at elevated temperature, additional actions from restrained thermal expansion, whether the system can redistribute actions after local heating, and the time objectives for evacuation and fire-fighting intervention. Chinese, Australian, European, and U.S. systems express this differently. Chinese practice usually combines building fire-code fire-resistance ratings, member fire-resistance limits, and specialist structural fire standards. Australia organises fire design through NCC performance requirements, Deemed-to-Satisfy pathways, and engineered Performance Solutions. Eurocode links fire actions, member temperature, and elevated-temperature material reduction in a structural fire-design chain. The U.S. commonly combines building-code requirements, ASTM E119 or UL tested ratings, and performance-based fire engineering. In cross-system review, the key is not to treat '120 min' as automatically equivalent safety, but to confirm whether design fire, load level, member boundary condition, protection system, failure criterion, and evacuation objective are aligned. If those assumptions differ, the same fire-resistance duration may represent very different heat input and structural reliability.

label.zh: 标准火不是唯一真实火灾
label.en: A standard fire is not the only real fire

text.zh: 标准升温曲线便于试验和分级，但真实建筑火灾受房间几何、通风、燃料、喷淋、开口和消防介入影响。性能化设计需要说明为何选用标准火、参数火或自然火灾模型。
text.en: A standard time-temperature curve supports testing and rating, but real building fires depend on enclosure geometry, ventilation, fuel, sprinklers, openings, and fire-fighting intervention. Performance-based design must state why a standard, parametric, or natural-fire model is selected.

label.zh: 高温降低的是材料和体系能力
label.en: Heating reduces material and system capacity

text.zh: 钢材、混凝土、木材和连接件在高温下退化方式不同。工程判断不能只看保护层厚度，还要看构件温度、剩余强度、刚度、连接、变形兼容和荷载重分配。
text.en: Steel, concrete, timber, and connections degrade differently at elevated temperature. Engineering judgement cannot stop at protection thickness; it must consider member temperature, residual strength, stiffness, connections, deformation compatibility, and load redistribution.

label.zh: 耐火时间要服务于明确目标
label.en: Fire duration must serve defined objectives

text.zh: 耐火极限的意义是为人员疏散、消防行动、相邻空间保护和结构整体稳定争取时间。若目标建筑、占用、疏散策略或消防条件不同，同一时间标签不能直接比较。
text.en: Fire-resistance duration is intended to support evacuation, fire service operations, adjacent-space protection, and structural stability. If occupancy, evacuation strategy, or fire-fighting conditions differ, the same time label is not directly comparable.

takeaway.zh: 结构防火复核应写清楚：设计火灾场景、采用的时间-温度曲线或自然火模型、荷载水平、构件温度计算、材料高温折减、边界约束、保护系统、连接和整体稳定检查，以及与疏散和消防策略的关系。耐火极限不是单独的材料属性，而是火灾作用、热传递、构件抗力和建筑目标共同形成的设计结论。
takeaway.en: A structural fire review should state the design fire scenario, selected time-temperature curve or natural-fire model, load level, member-temperature calculation, elevated-temperature material reductions, boundary restraint, protection system, connections, global stability checks, and the relationship to evacuation and fire-fighting strategy. Fire resistance is not a standalone material property; it is a design conclusion formed by fire action, heat transfer, member resistance, and building objectives together.

title.zh: 参考实例：为什么同一根钢梁的耐火验算不能只看“保护层厚度”？
title.en: Reference example: why can the fire check of one steel beam not rely only on protection thickness?

intro.zh: 假设一根受保护钢梁在火灾中承受设计弯矩。保护层厚度会影响升温速度，但构件是否满足要求还取决于火灾持续时间、截面系数、钢材温度、荷载比、边界约束和连接。下面公式用于说明概念路径；真实项目必须按适用建筑规范、结构防火标准、产品测试资料、构件边界条件和消防工程报告复核。
intro.en: Assume a protected steel beam carries a design bending action during fire. Protection thickness affects heating rate, but compliance also depends on fire duration, section factor, steel temperature, load ratio, boundary restraint, and connections. The equations below explain the concept path; real projects must be checked against the applicable building code, structural fire standard, product test data, member boundary conditions, and fire-engineering report.

label.zh: 火灾极限状态基本判断

citation.zh: Simplified screen；表达火灾设计作用效应不超过火灾设计抗力的极限状态思想。Eurocode结构防火部分采用火灾设计状况和高温材料折减；NCC、GB体系和美国建筑规范也要求把耐火目标与作用、构件和体系能力联系起来。
citation.en: Simplified screen expressing the limit-state idea that fire design action effect should not exceed fire design resistance. Eurocode structural fire parts use fire design situations and elevated-temperature material reductions; NCC, GB practice, and U.S. building codes also require fire objectives to be linked to actions, members, and system capacity.

label.zh: 钢材高温强度折减概念
label.en: Steel strength reduction at elevated temperature

citation.zh: Code-based concept from EN 1993-1-2 material reduction format；θ为钢材温度，ky,θ为高温屈服强度折减系数。实际取值应按适用规范表格、钢材类型和温度范围确定。
citation.en: Code-based concept from the EN 1993-1-2 material-reduction format; θ is steel temperature and ky,θ is the elevated-temperature yield-strength reduction factor. Actual values should follow the applicable code table, steel type, and temperature range.

label.zh: 截面系数影响升温速度

citation.zh: Derived heat-transfer indicator；Am为受火暴露表面积，V为单位长度体积。较大截面系数通常意味着升温更快，但真实温度还取决于保护材料、火灾曲线、阴影效应和边界条件。
citation.en: Derived heat-transfer indicator; Am is exposed surface area and V is volume per unit length. A larger section factor generally means faster heating, but real temperature also depends on protection, fire curve, shadow effect, and boundary conditions.

label.zh: 火灾设计弯矩抗力概念

citation.zh: Simplified screen；用于说明高温下抗弯能力可按材料和构件行为折减。真实设计不得只用单一折减系数替代规范方法，还需考虑截面分类、稳定、连接、热膨胀约束和荷载组合。
citation.en: Simplified screen used to show that bending resistance may be reduced for elevated-temperature material and member behaviour. Real design must not replace code methods with one reduction factor; section classification, stability, connections, restrained thermal expansion, and load combinations still matter.

citation.zh: Derived performance relation；用于说明结构耐火时间应服务于人员疏散、消防行动和防止非比例倒塌等目标，不是单独的产品宣传指标。
citation.en: Derived performance relation used to show that structural resistance time should support evacuation, fire service operations, and prevention of disproportionate collapse, not function as an isolated product label.

note.zh: 同一保护层厚度在不同截面、火灾曲线、荷载比和边界条件下可能产生不同安全水平。跨规范或跨产品比较时，应先对齐火灾场景、温度计算、试验依据、构件约束和目标性能，再比较耐火时间。
note.en: The same protection thickness can produce different safety levels for different sections, fire curves, load ratios, and boundary conditions. Cross-code or cross-product comparison should align fire scenario, temperature calculation, test basis, member restraint, and target performance before comparing fire-resistance time.

references: IStructE, The Structural Engineer, Volume 104 Issue 7, 2026: guidance clarifying the role of the structural engineer in designing building structures for fire.
EN 1993-1-2, Eurocode 3: Structural fire design for steel structures, including elevated-temperature material reduction concepts.
National Construction Code of Australia: performance requirements and fire-resistance pathways for building design.
ASTM E119 and UL fire-resistance testing frameworks: standard fire exposure and rating context used in U.S. practice.

referenceLinks.label: IStructE: New guidance supports design of building structures for fire
